title: Ningbo, Zhejiang — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ningbo, Zhejiang: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ningbo is a city in Zhejiang with a population of 9,404,000. A major port city in Zhejiang province, known for its deep-water harbor, textile industry, and historic Tianyi Pavilion library.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
